{"code":"; Get all Sentry issues and filter by substring
(def sentry-unresolved (filter #(and (= (:status %) "unresolved")
                                      (clojure.string/includes? (clojure.string/lower-case (:title %)) "sso scim provisioning"))
                                (sentry_issues)))
